CurrentIssues.ID: LongMethod:GameScreen.kt$@Composable private fun RoundView( uiState: GameUiState, onSubmitGuess: (Double, Double) -> Unit, onNextRound: () -> Unit, onSettingsClick: () -> Unit )

LongParameterList:FlickrApi.kt$FlickrApi$( @Query("method") method: String = "flickr.photos.search", @Query("api_key") apiKey: String, @Query("has_geo") hasGeo: Int = 1, @Query("extras") extras: String = "geo,url_m", @Query("format") format: String = "json", @Query("nojsoncallback") noJsonCallback: Int = 1, @Query("per_page") perPage: Int = 100, @Query("page") page: Int = 1 )
